description: This pipeline processes files in a folder by first listing all files, then creating annotations for each file based on its name or full path, and finally filtering the annotated files according to specific criteria.

db54ca15-c3c9-470d-90ea-66b8c1ddd28e.name: path-to-annotation-simple
db54ca15-c3c9-470d-90ea-66b8c1ddd28e.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.name: folder-list-files
afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.description: Lists all files in the input folder

dee7af1c-4ffa-4a54-b92f-8aaa9153d6b9.name: path-filter
dee7af1c-4ffa-4a54-b92f-8aaa9153d6b9.description: Filters the paths (files/folders) by their name or absolute path
